overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking through downtown Los Santos at night. The character travels along commercial sidewalks, passes pedestrians, crosses an intersection, and walks past the illuminated Los Santos transit sign while vehicles occasionally pass by on the streets.

large red illuminated billboard with white text

garbage bags and trash can on the sidewalk corner

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow commercial sidewalk at night, passing by a Payback Time storefront and illuminated billboards. A pedestrian in a green jacket walks past in the opposite direction. The street is lined with buildings and lit by street lamps and neon signs.

turning slightly toward the street to observe the photographer and traffic

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up to a street corner intersection. The character passes a photographer standing on the sidewalk taking pictures. The Los Santos building becomes visible in the distance across the intersection, and the character approaches the crosswalk area.

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the open intersection as a vintage car drives past. The large illuminated Los Santos neon sign becomes prominent on the right side. Traffic lights hang above the street showing red, and the character moves toward the modern glass building.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk along Los Santos transit building with landscaped planters

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk past the Los Santos transit building and landscaped areas

black metal park benches along the building facade

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the sidewalk adjacent to the Los Santos transit building, passing concrete planters with hedges and metal benches. An orange sports car drives by on the street. The neon Los Santos sign remains visible to the left as the character continues down the illuminated sidewalk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit commercial district that transitions from a narrow sidewalk into a wide, open city intersection. It begins by trailing the character past a Payback Time storefront and glowing billboards, moving through a stream of pedestrians under the glare of street lamps. As the path opens up at a street corner, the camera passes a photographer and reveals the distant Los Santos building across the road. The scene then shifts into the open intersection, where the character crosses the street past a vintage car while a large, illuminated Los Santos neon sign becomes a prominent focal point. Finally, the movement continues along the sidewalk of a modern glass transit building, passing concrete planters and metal benches as an orange sports car speeds by.
